# Test Fixtures

This folder contains shared test data used across multiple test suites.

## Contents (to be created during implementation)
- example_cgs_v1.json        — Minimal valid CGS for use in tests
- example_execution_plan.json — Sample ExecutionPlan for scheduler tests
- zombie_chase_world.json     — The Phase 9 vertical slice world snapshot
- invalid_cgs_*.json          — Invalid CGS examples for validation tests
